Panduan Praktik Klinis bagi Dokter di Fasilitas Pelayanan Kesehatan Tingkat Pertama
documents.notes: Single combined PDF containing Kepmenkes 514/2015 decree + Lampiran I (PPK Dokter — 155 kondisi klinis) + Lampiran II (Panduan Keterampilan Klinis). Verified page 1 cover names Kepmenkes HK.02.02/MENKES/514/2015 verbatim. Kemkes own subdomain siha.kemkes.go.id had 503 during crawl; official repository.kemkes.go.id book 755 Google Drive mirror was mislabeled (served Panduan Pelayanan Kesehatan Bergerak 2020 instead). Archive.org item (uploaded 2016-05, 50MB) was the only verifiable copy; content matches decree text. Status per Kemkes: superseded by Kepmenkes HK.01.07/MENKES/1186/2022 — keep for historical SKDI 4A retrieval. | ingested: 1279p via text path, 177 PPK conditions detected in Lampiran I, chunks=1872, lampiran_ii_deferred
